step_rationale: Androgen modulation of atherosclerosis, inflammation and coagulation; CV risk factor.
mechanism: Testosterone deficiency increases atherosclerotic disease progression and thrombotic risk through inflammatory and hemostatic effects.

references.title: Cardiovascular risk and testosterone - from subclinical atherosclerosis to lipoprotein function to heart failure.
Testosterone concentrations and risk of cardiovascular events in androgen-deficient men with atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease.
CYP17A1 deficient XY mice display susceptibility to atherosclerosis, altered lipidomic profile and atypical sex development.
Smoking and low serum testosterone associates with high concentration of oxidized LDL.
